title: clausena suffruticosa
intro: Clausena suffruticosa, also known as the Chinese quinine, is a small, deciduous shrub native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Clausena suffruticosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Clausena suffruticosa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation.
